name: brain-sk-statistics-tool
description: Isolated Statistical Intelligence tool for Brain SK — KPI/statistics computation and chart-ready JSON. Dependencies are PLANNED, not yet installed (setup-only scaffold).

_dependencyPlan.note: Run `npm install` of these only when a real statistics run is first executed. Keep isolated to this folder — never add to the Falcon Angular workspace.

preferred.@datashaper/arquero: clean / group / join / transform tabular data
preferred.duckdb | @duckdb/duckdb-wasm: SQL queries over JSON/CSV — use the wasm build if native is incompatible

optional.jstat: advanced statistical tests (t-test, chi-square, ...) — only if needed
